queries.question: What glamping pods are in Snowdonia and what tree houses are located there?
queries.sql:
SELECT GlampingPod.pod
FROM Location JOIN GlampingPod ON Location.id = GlampingPod.locationId
WHERE Location.name = "Snowdonia"
UNION
SELECT TreeHouse.House
FROM Location JOIN TreeHouse ON Location.id = TreeHouse.locationId
WHERE Location.name = "Snowdonia"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?location a :Locations .
    ?glampingpod a :GlampingPod .
    ?glampingpod p:hasLocation ?location .
    ?glampingpod p:pod ?pod .
    ?location p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Snowdonia")
    BIND(?pod AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?location a :Locations .
    ?treehouse a :TreeHouse .
    ?treehouse p:hasLocation ?location .
    ?treehouse p:house ?house .
    ?location p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Snowdonia")
    BIND(?house AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.sql:

FROM Location JOIN GlampingPod ON Location.id = GlampingPod.locationId

SELECT TreeHouse.House
